title: The Pittsburgh Businesses Actually Showing Up On Their Own Feed
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement.
intro:
Most Pittsburgh small businesses indexed this quarter have gone quiet on Instagram. Not deleted, not inactive by choice, just absent in the way a lot of neighborhood institutions are: present enough to have a profile, not present enough to matter algorithmically. The businesses below are the exceptions, ranked by 30-day posting cadence and engagement momentum.

A few are worth flagging before the list. Kyo Matcha in Squirrel Hill South is sitting fourth in Pittsburgh sweets overall, but its creator alignment is stronger than anything else in that category, and its review sentiment hasn't caught up yet, which means the ceiling is still open. Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange in the Strip District leads Pittsburgh cafes on both review depth and Instagram activity simultaneously, a combination that almost no one else in this index managed. Spot of Coffee in Shadyside is running on creator buzz with no TikTok presence to actually capture it.

That last pattern shows up repeatedly in this quarter's data and it will be the central question in Issue 02: which of these businesses close the gap between what creators are already doing for them and where the businesses themselves are showing up.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Fourth In Pittsburgh Sweets, With The Family's Strongest Creator Fit And A Review Sentiment That Hasn't Caught Up.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx

items.playbook_top_move: Address the portion and closing consistency gap. Review sentiment sits well below the family median; two separate complaints about soft serve portion variance and a premature close are the specific friction points pulling the number down.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Cafes, Powered By Creator Buzz It Has No TikTok To Catch.

featured_tiktok.author: asprinkleofjen
featured_tiktok.caption:
Delicious recent food and drinks I’ve got in Pittsburgh when eating out!! All time favs are @Spot Of Coffee & Alta Via!
#pittsburgh #pittsburghfood #foodie #pitt #thingstodo places to eat in Pittsburgh

items.playbook_top_move: Add a website link to Google listing. The Google profile has no website attached; 7 creators and 173 reviewers are sending people there with nowhere to land.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Bars On Review Depth Alone, With No TikTok Presence To Build On It.
items.playbook_top_move: Get the food story on video. Reels of the shepherd pie pierogi special and the $10 liter pour are the two most repeatable, specific hooks in the current review record; start there.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: Top Of Pittsburgh Cafes On Review Depth And Instagram. The TikTok Account Is Quiet.

featured_tiktok.author: christinaclothesncoffee

items.playbook_top_move: Turn the TikTok handle into a real presence. Post 2 TikToks per week from @adventureallegheny showing the pretzel Nitro Brew, the bean wall, and the cold brew taps, the three items creators already film.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars On Reviews And Photos, Not Yet On Video.
items.playbook_top_move: Turn the bar into a Reels set. Hidden Harbor posted 12 times in 30 days but shot zero Reels; one drink-pour or atmosphere Reel per week would directly address the weakest signal on the board.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Sweets, Carried By 3,145 Reviews. Creators Are On TikTok; Page's Still Is Not.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account creators built. Four creators generated 87,000 plays this quarter tagging a business with no TikTok presence. Registering an account captures that existing search traffic and named tags.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes On Review Depth, But Reels And TikTok Have Yet To Arrive.

featured_tiktok.author: latashaforpa
featured_tiktok.caption:
I might even buy you a coffee… ☕️ 

Stop by Tazza D’oro to pick-up, drop-off or sign my petition to get on the ballot in the May 19 Primary Election!

Team #Mayes2026 will be there 9A-3P Saturdays and Sundays starting today, February 21!

#

items.playbook_top_move: Start posting Reels, not just photos. Zero Reels in the last 30 days leaves the account invisible to Instagram's discovery feed; even two short-form videos per week would change the reach calculation meaningfully.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Sweets, With Creators On TikTok And No Account To Meet Them.

featured_tiktok.author: soysauceyybae

items.playbook_top_move: Address the portion complaint directly. The two most visible critical reviews both cite small portions at Bakery Square; one response on Google can shift the sentiment trajectory before it compounds.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Bars, Built On Reviews And A Single Manager. TikTok Has Barely Noticed.

featured_tiktok.author: jseguritan23
featured_tiktok.caption:
Trivial Warfare Army Takeover 2026 in Pittsburgh, PA:
Main trivia event hosted by Liz Quesnelle’s Madcap Trivia at the Hop Farm Brewing Company 

#pubtrivia #triviaevent #triviatime #triviatok #pittsburgh

items.playbook_top_move: Make the space impossible to scroll past. With 364 photos already on Google, the gap is short-form video. The live edge tables, garage door, and pool room are three distinct visual environments that creators have not filmed yet.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Seventh In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By Creators. The Shop Itself Has No TikTok To Show For It.

featured_tiktok.author: madisonrockk
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying cookie butter lattes wherever I go // #fyp #coffeeshop #pittsburgh #cookiebutterlatte #delaniescoffee

items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account now. Seven creators have already tagged this business; a TikTok profile lets Delanie's stitch, repost, and meet that audience where it already lives.
